name: VR Travel Venice Carnival Getting Lost

reviews.review_title: Get lost in Venice and explore
reviews.review_description: I've been many times in Venice. I could say I know the city quite well. In this VR experience up close and really photorealistic, I got a different perspective for the entire atmosphere there. Just dive into the streets and get lost, this seems to be Dart art... experiencig together butterfly effect on the go. Is having no plan a good plan? In this experience I have to say: yes!
